name_en: Full steel hardware 👻 Top-tier original batch 😻 changed code chip 💯 Model: M12099 Black Small Double-sided Shopping Bag ❣️❣️ Neverfull Bandoulière Inside Out BB Handbag. This season's interpretation of a classic double-sided design, featuring the iconic Monogram canvas and grained leather on the front and back. The removable zip pouch can be used alone or hung externally. The detachable shoulder strap allows for crossbody wear, while the dazzling metal hardware adds refined details.
